text: The glass and steel of the meeting room reflect a calm, futuristic order, yet the tilted perspective hints at displacement, as though the world is just slightly off its axis. Stepping into the second scene, the bright, geometric colors of the R+D space invigorate me with a sense of curiosity and wonder about human ingenuity. Yet, beneath the surface, I sense a lingering question: am I an observer or a participant in this ever-evolving experiment of knowledge and creation? The detachment of technology and the promise of discovery fill me with both excitement and a subtle unease about my place within it all.
